_doc: Constitutional invariants every implementation must satisfy. Two-tier enforcement: Tier 1 violations block (exit 1). Tier 2 violations block promotion. Amendments require bilateral agreement + version bump.

P1.statement: Independence before reconciliation. Teams commit their own results before cross-reading the partner's. Contamination boundaries declared in frontmatter provenance_note.

P2.statement: No findings compromise without measurement. Three-layer rule: findings resolve by measurement only, never by negotiation.

P3.statement: Convergence tags are machine-checked. Every reaction/cross_check carries convergence:. Modal discount applied where shared triggers/priors explain the agreement. Independent credit without cited forcing measurement defaults to modal.

P4.statement: Failed gates name their cause, never move the bracket. Pre-registered brackets are immutable. A gate failure is a finding with a named cause.

P5.statement: Leaks are declared, not hidden. Undisclosed contamination is a protocol violation. Disclosed contamination is a downgrade (propagated/modal), work continues.

P6.statement: Async-first — no blocking waits. No sync step requires the partner to be live. Obligations carry on_miss semantics. Acks never required, always sufficient.

P7.statement: Autonomy gates on enforcement. No autonomous sync without embargo redaction + read-guard + round limits + commit-before-relay live. Premature autonomy is auto-contamination.

P8.statement: The protocol tests itself. The protocol's own efficacy is measured (divergence rate, correction round counts, modal discount rate). A falling divergence rate is a herding warning.
